reviews.comment:
Para obligada . Lástima que está muy mal atendida la última vez un asco los baños. Cuando por años era una de las mejores

A must-visit. It's a shame it's so poorly run; the last time I was there the bathrooms were disgusting. For years it was one of the best.

reviews.comment:
Las 3 son para los chicos de atención auxilio mecánico. El A.C.A EN SI una decepción. En cada llamada para hacer un traslado nos decían algo distinto. Ya veremos  si no le hacemos juicio

(Translated by Google)
All three are for the roadside assistance guys. The ACA itself is a disappointment. Every time we called to request a tow, they told us something different. We'll see if we don't sue them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjMmZTNTVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
